ddls:
CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was held */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level (foreign key referencing the levels table) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport (foreign key referencing the sports table) */,
  "championship_name" TEXT /* Name of the championship */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the championship was held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the championship */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up team */,
  "final_four3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third team in the final four */,
  "final_four4_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth team in the final four */,
  "mvp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Most Valuable Player (MVP) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the championship event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_runner_up_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_final_four3_id FOREIGN KEY ("final_four3_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_final_four4_id FOREIGN KEY ("final_four4_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championships_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "metro_area" TEXT /* Metropolitan area where the team is based */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution the team represents */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of level */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role (foreign key referencing the roles table) */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championships_teams" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship (foreign key referencing the championships table) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (foreign key referencing the teams table) */,
  "team_position" TEXT /* Position of the team in the championship (e.g., champion, runner-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id", "team_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each championship event
ID of the level (foreign key referencing the levels table)
ID of the sport (foreign key referencing the sports table)
Location where the championship was held

Password of the user (hashed for security)
Timestamp when the user account was created
